tr.td: 1 tablet (325 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (75 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms per spray, use one spray under the tongue as needed for chest pain, repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Live attenuated Human alphaherpesvirus 3 only vaccine product
Assessment of health and social care needs
Depression screening using Patient Health Questionnaire Two-Item score (procedure)
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Erythrocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Hematocrit [Volume Fraction] of Blood by Automated count
Erythrocyte distribution width [Entitic volume] by Automated count
Platelets [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet mean volume [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
